metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_219
metadata.comment:
Rationale: This paper identifies Homer1b/c as a Shank-interacting protein and uses immuno-EM to demonstrate localization in the PSD.

Note: HOMER1a does not have this CC (see SynGO ticket #239).

9/3/2017 Pim:
-Homer1b/c isoforms are different from Homer1a. I have made this annotation against the general Homer1 protein accession since this describes the general idea on the homer gene localization.. Experimental description: From M&M:
Immunoelectron Microscopy
We used a postembedding immunogold method as described previously (Zhao et al., 1998; Petralia et al., 1999). Briefly, a male Sprague-Dawley rat was perfused with [...]
